description_long: This spice rack consists of a circular wooden base supporting three white, ribbed ceramic containers. Two of the containers are shorter and wider, while the third is taller and slender, each with a fitted dispenser top. The containers are arranged symmetrically on the base, with the taller bottle positioned centrally and the two shorter ones flanking it. Subtle text labels are visible on the front of the containers, indicating their intended contents such as oil, salt, and pepper. The ceramic surfaces are glossy and smooth, reflecting light softly. The overall design is modern and clean, suitable for display on a kitchen countertop or dining table.
description: A modern spice rack with three white ribbed ceramic containers on a circular wooden base, featuring subtle text labels and glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three containers, with the taller bottle in the center and clear text labels visible on the front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of the containers, with the taller bottles' dispenser tops and no visible labels.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the containers, emphasizing their ribbed texture and the symmetry of the arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view similar to view 1, showing the backs of the containers and the arrangement on the wooden base.
